title: Genetic Manipulation of MicroRNAs in the Silk Gland of Silkworm, Bombyx Mori
author: Wang, Wang, et al.

steps.title: RNA Extraction and Real-time Fluorescent Quantitative PCR Assay
steps.instruction: The total RNA of tissues of silkworm (Dazao) was extracted by TRIzol (Ambion, U.S.A), and the concentration was determined by spectrophotometer (NanoDrop 2000). DNase I (Promega, U.S.A) was used to digest the genome DNA at 37 °C for 30 min. MiRNA reverse transcription kit (Clontech, U.S.A) was used to synthesize the cDNA, and the expression of miRNA-274 was detected by real-time fluorescent quantitative PCR (qPCR) on the instrument, ABI 7500 fast. The primers for qRT-PCR include qmiR-274-5p, TTTGTGACCGTCACTAACGGGCA; qmiR-274-3p, TCGTTTTGGCGATCGCAAAATG; qmiR-1175, AAGTGGAGTAGTGGTCTCATCG.
